response.justification: Highly experienced senior/staff engineer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, React-adjacent, and PostgreSQL-relevant skills, plus AWS, Kubernetes, and LLM/MCP exposure that match the nice-to-haves. However, the role is explicitly entry-level and requires high on-site presence in what appears to be a German-speaking renewable energy context, while the candidate is a 20+ year senior based in Berlin with only basic German — creating significant overqualification, salary-expectation, and retention risks.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js fullstack experience with React and PostgreSQL-adjacent DB work
Strong nice-to-haves coverage: AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, and LLM/MCP agent tooling
Berlin-based, enabling the required on-site presence
concerns: Severely overqualified for an entry-level IC role — likely flight risk and salary mismatch
Only basic German, which may limit fit in a construction/energy-consulting domain with heavy local stakeholder interaction
No demonstrated Nest.js experience or renewable-energy/construction domain background

key_factors.factor: Basic German in on-site German-market role
